# Namespace Topic Module

This module creates an Event Grid namespace and topic.

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.9, < 2.0)

- <a name="requirement_azapi"></a> [azapi](#requirement\_azapi) (~> 2.4)

## Resources

The following resources are used by this module:

- [azapi_resource.namespace_topics](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/Azure/azapi/latest/docs/resources/resource) (resource)

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD013 -->
## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_name"></a> [name](#input\_name)

Description: The name of the Namespace Topic.

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_namespace_id"></a> [namespace\_id](#input\_namespace\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the EventGrid Namespace.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_auto_create_topic"></a> [auto\_create\_topic](#input\_auto\_create\_topic)

Description: Whether the topic should be automatically created when a matching event is published.

Type: `bool`

Default: `false`

### <a name="input_description"></a> [description](#input\_description)

Description: An optional description for the topic.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_event_retention_in_days"></a> [event\_retention\_in\_days](#input\_event\_retention\_in\_days)

Description: Number of days to retain events for this topic.

Type: `number`

Default: `7`

### <a name="input_input_schema"></a> [input\_schema](#input\_input\_schema)

Description: The input schema for the topic (e.g. EventGridSchema, CloudEventSchemaV1\_0, CustomEventSchema).

Type: `string`

Default: `"EventGridSchema"`

### <a name="input_publisher_type"></a> [publisher\_type](#input\_publisher\_type)

Description: The type of publisher for this topic. Allowed values: 'Custom' or 'Microsoft'.

Type: `string`

Default: `"Custom"`

### <a name="input_schema_validation"></a> [schema\_validation](#input\_schema\_validation)

Description: Optional schema validation settings.

Type:

```hcl
object({
    type       = string
    properties = map(any)
  })
```

Default: `null`

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_name"></a> [name](#output\_name)

Description: The name of the namespace topic.

### <a name="output_resource_id"></a> [resource\_id](#output\_resource\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the namespace topic.

## Modules

No modules.

## Data Collection

The software may collect information about you and your use of the software and send it to Microsoft. Microsoft may use this information to provide services and improve our products and services. You may turn off the telemetry as described in the repository. There are also some features in the software that may enable you and Microsoft to collect data from users of your applications. If you use these features, you must comply with applicable law, including providing appropriate notices to users of your applications together with a copy of Microsoft’s privacy statement. Our privacy statement is located at <https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=824704>. You can learn more about data collection and use in the help documentation and our privacy statement. Your use of the software operates as your consent to these practices.
